questions.question: What number should replace the question mark? 70 & 91 & 120 , 14 & 13 & 24 , 5 & 7 & ?
What is thread safety in OOP?

answers.A2: Property that data structures work correctly when accessed by multiple threads simultaneously

questions.key: Property that data structures work correctly when accessed by multiple threads simultaneously
questions.justification: Thread safety ensures data consistency and correctness when multiple threads access shared resources.

questions.question: What is operator overloading in C++?

answers.A2: Defining custom behavior for operators when applied to user-defined types

questions.key: Defining custom behavior for operators when applied to user-defined types
questions.justification: Operator overloading allows operators like +, -, * to work with custom classes by providing specific implementations.

questions.question: Can multiple catch blocks follow a single try block?

answers.A1: No, only one catch block allowed
answers.A2: Yes, multiple catch blocks can handle different exception types
answers.A4: Only if they handle the same exception type

questions.key: Yes, multiple catch blocks can handle different exception types
questions.justification: Multiple catch blocks allow handling different exception types with specific recovery logic for each.
